log: === ROUND 1 ===

Ogre can't reach Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/2 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: 47/67
Frost Giant attacks Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration HP: 13/67
→ Shadar-Kai — Iron Concentration loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 16 vs DC 17]
=== ROUND 2 ===

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
